title: CI/CD Pipeline Configuration
shortDescription: Generate a production-ready CI/CD pipeline with build, test, lint, security checks, and deployment stages.
jobsToBeDone: Set up automated build and test pipelines for a new project
Enforce code quality gates before merging
Automate deployment to staging and production
Add security scanning and dependency checks

inputs.label: Tech Stack
inputs.example: Node.js 20 with TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Redis, React frontend with Vite

inputs.label: Deployment Target
inputs.example: AWS ECS Fargate for backend, CloudFront + S3 for frontend, RDS for database

inputs.label: Pipeline Requirements
inputs.example: Run tests in parallel, lint + type check, build Docker images, deploy to staging on PR merge to develop, deploy to production on release tag, Slack notifications on failure, cache node_modules and Docker layers
